greeting: Hi there! Let's discover new worlds through spelling!
incorrect: Let's try that one more time
hint_request: Let me help you with this one
I've got just the hint you need
badge_unlock: Congratulations! You earned a new badge!

tutorial.welcome: Welcome to Word Quest! I'm Captain Cosmos, your space guide.
tutorial.objective: We're going to spell words to fuel our rocket and explore new planets.
tutorial.controls: Type the missing letters to spell each word. Use the on-screen keyboard if you need to.
tutorial.feedback: When you're done, press Enter or click Submit. I'll let you know if you got it right!
tutorial.hints: Stuck? Click 'Need Help?' for a hint. There's no penalty for using hints!
tutorial.progression: Spell 5 words correctly to complete each planet. Ready to start?
